title: dactylis hyrcana
intro: Dactylis hyrcana, also known as Persian orchard grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and is also used to treat respiratory issues and boost the immune system. Dactylis hyrcana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
